name: craftdle
description: Minecraft-themed guessing game inspired by Loldle

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "cd client && npm run preview"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd .. && npm run fetch-data
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
